title: Wholesome Egyptian Chickpea Salad
description: A vibrant, plant-based chickpea salad with warm turmeric, crisp cucumber, and a light lemon-yogurt dressing, perfect for a light lunch or snack.
instructions: Rinse and drain the canned chickpeas, setting them aside.
Place the chickpeas in a preheated broiler at 450F, broiling for 5 minutes until golden and slightly crispy.
Slice cucumber, dice tomato, thinly slice the red onion, and chop parsley.
In a large bowl, combine the broiled chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, onion, and parsley.
Whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, turmeric powder, garlic, salt, pepper, and soy yogurt to create the dressing.
Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently until everything is well coated.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, adding more salt or pepper.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes to let flavors meld.
Serve chilled or at room temperature, perhaps with a side of warm pita or flatbread.
